headline: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Stock Still Looks Undervalued As Its 302% Run Cools
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise stock has surged over the past few years, yet the current checks show a more measured picture, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate pointing to a sizeable discount to the market price while the broader valuation score is only mixed. Hewlett Packard Enterprise has returned 302.0% over the past 5 years, which puts extra focus on whether the current share price still lines up with underlying value.
